case_title: LEW, HING DIP vs. ARRELL, DENISE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, REX

PRO TEM JUDGE HARRIS WEINBERG OATH DATE 1/31/94 BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER ALL PARTIES PRESENT DEFENDANT WILL VACATE BY 6/30/94 AT MIDNIGHT, IF DEFT. VACATES BY THE ABOVE DATE AND TIME, PLT. WILL DISMISS ACTION, AND WAIVES RIGHT TO BACK RENT AND ATTY. FEES, AND COST. PLT. WILL RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT. IN EVENT DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE PLT. MANY FILE STIP. AND ENTER JUDGMENT FOR: FOR RESTITUTION, BACK RENT, COST AND ATTY. ALLOWABLE BY COURT. MRS. GAVIN REPRESENTS TO COURT AND DEFT. THAT SHE HAS AUTHORITY TO BIND PLT. TO THIS AGREEMENT.
